scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:dev -w apps/gateway" "npm run start:dev -w apps/services/auth-service" "npm run start:dev -w apps/services/ia-service" "npm run start:dev -w apps/services/user-service" "npm run start:dev -w apps/services/whatsapp-service" "npm run start:dev -w apps/services/mail-service" "npm run start:dev -w apps/services/telegram-service" "npm run start:dev -w apps/services/redis-service"
scripts.web:dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w shell" "npm run dev -w dashboard" "npm run dev -w contacts" "npm run dev -w composer"
scripts.web:build: npm run build -w dashboard && npm run build -w contacts && npm run build -w composer && npm run build -w shell
scripts.deploy: git push origin main && ssh -i C:\Users\palma\.ssh\build-server_key.pem -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no azureuser@20.98.66.189 "/home/azureuser/remote-build.sh"
